title: acetosella corniculata var. villosa
intro: Acetosella corniculata var. villosa, also known as the hairy sorrel or hairy oxalis, is a type of plant that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion, due to its high concentration of oxalic acid. The health benefits of Acetosella corniculata var. villosa include its potential to help reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions like eczema. Acetosella corniculata var. villosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in herbal salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
